reviews.comment:
En general todo limpio, la atención de las chicas excelente. Lo único que si a mejorar son los vasos de café para llevar . Tendrían que ser de polipapel y con una buena tapa para llevar en el auto.

(Translated by Google)
Overall, everything was clean, and the staff were excellent. The only thing that could be improved are the takeaway coffee cups. They should be made of paper and have a good lid for taking in the car.
